failures.description: The agent misread or incorrectly reasoned over the catalog search result, selecting item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though the tool output showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer using the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the same incorrect answer.
